# IPartyEvents.MemberLeft event

Fires when a member leaves. The [`PartyMember`](../../Stellar.Abstractions.Domain/PartyMember.md) argument carries last-known state at the time of leave.

```csharp
public event Action<PartyMember, PartyLeaveKind> MemberLeft;
```
